description: Get a non-expert from zero to a Slack-delivered, plain-English, waste-flagged AWS bill breakdown — and cache it so you don't pay per Cost Explorer call.

tools.name: accounts_get
tools.description: Get one synced AWS account. Required: account_id. Returns the Account.

tools.name: accounts_list
tools.description: List synced AWS accounts in the organization. Returns array of Account.

tools.name: costs_list
tools.description: List synced cost lines. Optional: service, account_id, granularity. Returns array of CostLine.

tools.name: forecasts_list
tools.description: List synced cost forecasts. Returns array of Forecast.

tools.name: inventory_list
tools.description: List synced resources with estimated monthly cost and waste. Optional: type, account_id. Returns array of InventoryResource.

params.name: type
params.description: Filter by resource type (ec2, ebs, snapshot, eip, s3)
